meaning: n.矮脚体壮毛厚的西班牙猎犬
examples: The Clumber is primarily a white dog with lemon color or orange color markings.
The Clumber has a good neck frill and on no condition should his throat be shaved.
The Clumber should have a long neck with some slackness of throat or presence of dewlap not to be faulted.
It has given BBC Nottingham a hive for the Bee Part Of It campaign, which will be based at Clumber Park, north Nottinghamshire.
